overview: Concierge functional medicine practice offering personalized, root-cause focused treatment for chronic health issues. Integrates functional medicine with regenerative medicine including stem cell therapy.
highlights: Stem cell therapy with VSEL and SONGLaser activation
Advanced lab testing and comprehensive evaluation
Root-cause assessment of chronic health conditions
targetAudience: Successful professionals in their 40s, 50s, and beyond seeking comprehensive chronic disease management.
